note: design↔live element correspondence for the Run cockpit's empty state — the design's 'What should we run first?' composer stage (copilot-firstrun.jsx at ?state=key) vs the live OnboardingComposer the cockpit mounts via renderEmptyComposer. The load-bearing, genuinely-comparable elements are the hero H1 + the starter chips (onboarding.css `.fr-*`, the surface this change introduces). The composer CHROME (textarea/model pill/send) is the app's SHARED AssistantComposer (aui-*/atlas-*), NOT a reimplementation of the mock's simplified `.cmp-*` composer, so those anchors are marked expectDivergence — filed as INFO, not defects.

elements.label: composer.box
elements.expectDivergence: live mounts the app's SHARED AssistantComposer (aui-*), not a reimplementation of the mock's simplified `.cmp` box — intended (the composer is shared across chat + run)

elements.label: composer.send
elements.expectDivergence: shared AssistantComposer send button, not the mock's bespoke `.cmp-send`

elements.label: model.pill
elements.expectDivergence: shared AssistantComposer model pill, not the mock's bespoke `.cmp-pill`
